metadata.title: Blog
metadata.description: Evidence-based articles on physiotherapy, nutrition, and clinical practice — written by Bosla's medical educators.

listing.title: Blog
listing.subtitle: Evidence-based reads for healthcare professionals. Explore {count, plural, =0 {our upcoming articles} one {# article} other {# articles}} now!
listing.emptyDescription: Try a different search or browse all topics.

cta.title: Turn reading into real clinical skills
cta.subtitle: Go deeper than articles — learn from accredited Arabic medical courses built by expert clinicians.

author.createDescription: Share your clinical knowledge on the Bosla blog. Your article starts as a draft — publish it when it's ready.
author.editDescription: Update your article's content, category, and cover image.
author.published: Article published — it's now live on the blog.
author.unpublished: Article unpublished — it's back to a draft.
author.myArticlesDescription: Your drafts and published articles — edit or publish them from here.
author.myArticlesEmptyDescription: Your drafts and published articles will appear here once you write your first one.
